sentences.arabic: تَصِلُ لَيْلَى إِلَى مَكْتَبِهَا فِي السَّاعَةِ الثَّامِنَةِ صَبَاحًا.
sentences.translation: Lejla stiže u svoju kancelariju u osam sati ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Layla arrives at her office at eight o'clock in the morning.

sentences.arabic: تَقْرَأُ رَسَائِلَ الْبَرِيدِ الْإِلِكْتْرُونِيِّ وَتُنَظِّمُ جَدْوَلَ مَهَامِّهَا.
sentences.translation: Čita e-mailove i organizuje svoj raspored zadataka.
sentences.translationEn: She reads emails and organizes her task schedule.

sentences.arabic: تَشْرَبُ الْقَهْوَةَ مَعَ زُمَلَائِهَا أَثْنَاءَ الِاسْتِرَاحَةِ الْقَصِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pije kafu sa svojim kolegama tokom kratke pauze.
sentences.translationEn: She drinks coffee with her colleagues during the short break.
